content.en:
Ye Tian chatted with Xuehe for a while.

Before leaving, Xue Dao said: "Brother Ye Tian, if you have time in the future, you can come to Liuli Mountain to find me." "

"Yes, definitely!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently.

Snow River departed.

"Liuli Mountain, the top ten great forces in the Aughu Country!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this moment, he was still thinking back to the Dao Seed Secret Technique that Xue He had used before, which was much more powerful than the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Skill, and even he couldn't shake that Dao Seed Secret Technique.

It can be seen how terrifying the strength is after condensing the Eternal Dao Seed and the Eternal Dao Body.

......

Roselle City.

Ye Tian came back, and the first time, Luo Wushuang came over curiously to ask.

"Ye Tian, you went to Jiuhu Mountain, did you pass the assessment?"

Luo Wushuang asked expectantly.

"It's passed!" Ye Tian nodded.

"Great!"

Luo Wushuang was excited.

Ye Tian joined that mysterious big force, which was equivalent to bringing a huge backer to Luoxia Pavilion!

From now on, no force will come to trouble Ye Tian.

Even if Ye Tian leaves, for an endless long time, this shelter still exists!

Next, Luo Xia Pavilion publicized the news, which shocked all parties in the Auganda Kingdom.

Of course.

It's just that the general forces are jealous, the real top forces, such as Liulishan, still don't care about Luoxia Pavilion, unless Ye Tian's strength can reach a very strong level, it is worthy of the jealousy of forces like Liulishan.

......

"I've joined the Nine Extremes Alliance, let's see if I can use 100 Nine Pole Points to exchange for some information about the Eternal Dao Species, so that I can create a Perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed faster!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered the Nine Extremes Void of the Nine Extremes Alliance, and entered through the Bronze Order of the Nine Extremes Alliance, and his will was exchanged and traded in it.

If it involves a physical transaction, it can be done in person.

Soon, Ye Tian saw a lot of transactions of Eternal Dao Seed materials, but none of them were complete Eternal Dao Species.

The true Eternal Dao Species, even the inferior Eternal Dao Species, all have 19,000 Extreme Points!

And these materials are not very precious, many of them are ten points or even a few points, and the slightly better ones are only a few dozen points.

Ye Tian used up all 100 points and exchanged five pieces of information.

After getting these five pieces of information, Ye Tian found that the content involved in these materials was extremely majestic, and it was many times more perfect than the information he had traded in the hands of the major forces before.

Except for those that do not involve the core content of the Eternal Dao, these five materials are all available for reference.

For Ye Tian, the help is also great.

"With this bit of information, I am at least sure that in the 30 million Solstice Dao Era, I will create a perfect eternal Dao species!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In addition, he also found that there are many good things and treasures that can be traded here, but they all require infinite points, and some even cost tens of thousands of nine-pole points or even hundreds of thousands of nine-pole points.

And he's still a pauper.

"Hey, some members have purchased high-quality Eternal Sequence Dao Rule items, 500 Nine Pole Points a piece, and the price is okay!"

Ye Tian was going to fuse some more high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, so that he could exchange them for one more Nine Pole Points.

Of course.

There aren't many members who acquire high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, and they won't have too many points, so they can't do too much in this kind of transaction, and it is obviously impossible to get a steady stream of Nine Pole Points from such a transaction.

Thereupon.

In the following years, Ye Tian purchased high-quality first-order supreme Dao rule items and fused them into eternal sequence supreme Dao rule items, while on the other hand, he used the Sunset Disc to deduce the perfect-level eternal Dao species.

And just like that, the long years passed.

Before you know it, 30 million years of the Eternal Dao Era have passed.

this day.

Rumble!

After urging the Sun Disc again, Ye Tian finally thoroughly deduced the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Species.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian was excited.

This is a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, an Eternal Dao Seed without any flaws!

"The Eternal Dao Species deduced from the Ruin Sun Disc is called the Ruin Sun Dao Species!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After creating the Ruin Sun Dao Seed, he only needs to cultivate according to the Ruin Sun Dao Seed to condense the Ruin Sun Dao Seed in his body, and then he only needs to use the Ruin Sun Dao Seed to transform his body step by step, so that his body can transform into an eternal Dao Body.

Of course.

If the Xuri Dao Species wants to transform the body into an eternal Dao body, it still needs some resources and treasures to make the body transform into an eternal Dao body step by step, and it is not possible to complete the transformation all at once, and the resources that need to be consumed are unimaginable.

Especially the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Body, the resources it consumes are even more terrifying.

"First condense the Ruins Dao Species, once you condense the Ruins Sun Dao Species, you can deduce and create the Dao Seed Secret Technique, which can exert a more powerful strength!"

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to mobilize the Eternal Sequence Dao Rules of the Ten Perfection Realm, and began to condense little by little according to the condensation method of the Ruin Sun Dao Species.

The years passed.

After continuous structural condensation, after hundreds of thousands of years of the Eternal Sequence Dao Rule, the Eternal Sequence Dao Seed was finally successfully condensed in the body.

Rumble!!!!!

The power of the Ruin Sun Dao Seed continued to radiate to the body, causing the body to begin to undergo a slight change, which was the beginning of the eternal Dao body.

However, relying on the ruin sun dao seed to slowly transform the body by himself, a hundred trillion to the dao era do not want to completely complete the eternal dao body, you must use resources and treasures to do so.

"Successfully condense the Dao Seed of the Ruins Day, and then deduce the secret technique of creating the Dao Seed first!"

Ye Tian decided.

So, he spent some years, and with the help of the ruin disc, he easily deduced a secret technique.

【Dao Secret Technique - Spear of the Sun】

【Dao Seed Secret Technique - Ruins Sun Aurora】

【Dao Secret Technique - Immortal Cover of the Sun】

【Dao Seed Secret Technique - Grip of the Sun】

【Dao Seed Secret Technique - Market Sun Domain】

【Dao Secret Technique - Prison of the Sun】

After creating and deducing these Dao secret techniques, Ye Tian's strength underwent earth-shaking changes.

"What I have condensed is a perfect-level eternal Dao Seed, and the Dao Seed Secret Technique I have cast is definitely even more powerful!"

"The next thing is to carry out the Eternal Dao Body, after the Eternal Dao Body is completely completed, it can be regarded as the real Eternal Dao Body entry, and there are Xiaocheng, Dacheng and Consummation Realms behind, and the cultivation has to be improved step by step, there are a lot of things to cultivate!"

Ye Tian muttered.
